---
title: "environmental_data"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, dbplyr, here, janitor, RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr, terra, rio, zoo)

```

# Load data

### RABO
```{r}
# Amphibian Disease Portal
adp_raw = read_csv(here("data", "amphibian_disease_data_processed.csv"))

adp_filter = adp_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(length),
         !is.na(decimalLatitude),
         diseaseTested == "Bd",
         testMethod %in% c("quantitative PCR", "realtime PCR"),
         basisOfRecord == "LivingSpecimen")

adp_group = adp_filter %>%
  group_by(projectId, diagnosticLab, family, order, genus, specificEpithet, length >= 38) %>%
  count()

peace = adp_filter %>%
  select(testMethod) %>%
  distinct()

adp_select = adp_filter %>%
  filter(genus == "Rana",
         specificEpithet == "boylii",
         diagnosticLab == "Briggs Lab, University of California Santa Barbara")

rabo_clean = adp_select %>%
  mutate(svl_mm = length,
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
           svl_mm >= 38 ~ "adult",
           svl_mm < 38 ~ "subadult"),
         date = as.Date(verbatimEventDate),
         bd_its_copies = quantityDetected * as.numeric(dilutionFactor) * 60,
         taxon_capture = "rana_boylii",
         site = tolower(gsub(",", "", gsub(" ", "_", locality))),
         population = "alameda",
         region = "california",
         country = "usa",
         project = "RABO")

rabo_sites = rabo_clean %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarize(site_latitude = mean(decimalLatitude, na.rm = TRUE),
            site_longitude = mean(decimalLongitude, na.rm = TRUE))

rabo_visit = rabo_clean %>%
  left_join(rabo_sites, by = "site") %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

```

## RIBBiTR
```{r}
dbcon = hopToDB("ribbitr", hopReg = FALSE)

# table pointers
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
db_capture = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "capture"))
db_survey = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "survey"))
db_visit = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "visit"))
db_site = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "site"))
db_region = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "region"))
db_country = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "country"))


# preliminary data
ribbitr_visit = db_sample %>%
  left_join(db_capture, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  left_join(db_site, by = "site_id") %>%
  left_join(db_region, by = "region_id") %>%
  left_join(db_country, by = "country_id") %>%
  filter(sample_type == "bd",
         !is.na(taxon_capture)) %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  collect()

```

## USGS
```{r}
usgs_raw = read.csv(here("data", "USGSBsalBdDataFull.csv")) %>%
  clean_names()

usgs_visit = usgs_raw %>%
  mutate(site = paste0("usgs_", site_id),
         date = mdy(collection_date)) %>% 
  group_by(site) %>%
  mutate(site_latitude = mean(latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
         site_longitude = mean(longitude, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(site, site_latitude, site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")
```

## RACA
```{r}
raca_raw = read.csv(here("data", "JPSL_RACA_Swabbed_Individuals_2026-03-03.csv"))

raca_clean = raca_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::rename(site_utme = utme_site,
                site_utmn = utmn_site) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         site = tolower(gsub(" ", "_", site_name)))

raca_sites = raca_clean %>%
  select(site,
         site_utme,
         site_utmn) %>%
  distinct()

# convert to lat lon
raca_points = cbind(raca_sites$site_utme,
                    raca_sites$site_utmn)

v_utm = vect(raca_points, crs="+proj=utm +zone=10 +datum=WGS84  +units=m")
v_ll = project(v_utm, "+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84")
v_lonlat = geom(v_ll)[, c("x", "y")]

raca_sites_ll = raca_sites %>%
  bind_cols(v_lonlat) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site_longitude = x,
         site_latitude = y) %>%
  select(site,
         site_latitude,
         site_longitude)

raca_visit = raca_clean %>%
  select(site,
         date) %>%
  left_join(raca_sites_ll, by = "site") %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

```

## RALU
```{r}
ralu_raw = import_list(here("data", "Data Russell et al 2010 DAO.xlsx"))

# site coordinates
ralu_sites = ralu_raw[[2]] %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(site = tolower(pond_name))

ralu_points = cbind(ralu_sites$x_nad83_zone11n,
                    ralu_sites$y_nad83_zone11n)

w_utm = vect(ralu_points, crs="+proj=utm +zone=11 +datum=WGS84  +units=m")
w_ll = project(w_utm, "+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84")
w_lonlat = geom(w_ll)[, c("x", "y")]

ralu_sites_ll = ralu_sites %>%
  bind_cols(w_lonlat) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site_longitude = x,
         site_latitude = y) %>%
  select(site,
         site_latitude,
         site_longitude)

ralu_visit = ralu_raw[[4]] %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(bd_sample_date),
         site = tolower(pond_name)) %>%
    select(site,
         date) %>%
  left_join(ralu_sites_ll, by = "site") %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

```

### HYPHY
```{r}
### Hylodes phyllodes
hyphy_raw = import_list(here("data", "CDMR_H.phyllodes_metadata_Oct2_LKS.xlsx"))[[1]]

hyphy_clean = hyphy_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(timepoint == 0) %>%
  # filter(timepoint == 0 | treatment == "Saline control") %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(capture_date),
    svl_mm = as.numeric(svl),
    life_stage_simple = case_when(
    svl_mm < 27.5 ~ "subadult",
    svl_mm >= 27.5 ~ "adult",
    .default = NA),
    taxon_capture = "hylodes_phyllodes",
    site = gsub("aw", "s", tolower(transect)),
    population = region,
    country = "brazil",
    bd_its_copies = bd_load,
    project = "HYPHY"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_stage_simple),
         !is.na(bd_its_copies),
         life_stage_simple %in% c("adult", "subadult"))

hyphy_population_valid = hyphy_clean %>%
  group_by(population) %>%
  summarize(n_adult = sum(life_stage_simple == "adult"),
            n_subadult = sum(life_stage_simple == "subadult"),
            .groups = "drop")

hyphy_sites = db_site %>%
  filter(site %in% hyphy_clean$site) %>%
  select(site,
         site_latitude,
         site_longitude,
         site_elevation_m) %>%
  collect()

hyphy_visit = hyphy_clean %>%
  left_join(hyphy_sites, by = "site") %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")
```

### BOFA
```{r}
### Boana faber
bofa_raw = read_tsv(here("data", "Boana_faber_capture_data_for_Cob.csv"))

bofa_clean = bofa_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(capture_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"),
    svl_mm = as.numeric(svl),
    life_stage_simple = case_when(
      svl_mm < 63 ~ "subadult",
      svl_mm >= 63 ~ "adult",
      .default = NA),
    bd_its_copies = coalesce(bd_loads, as.numeric(bd_q1), as.numeric(bd_q2)),
    bd_its_copies = if_else(is.na(bd_its_copies), 0, bd_its_copies),
    taxon_capture = "boana_faber",
    site = tolower(gsub(" ", "_", capture_site)),
    site = if_else(grepl("o_paulo$", site), "joao_paulo", site),
    population = case_when(
      site == "lago_anta" ~ "santa_virginia",
      .default = site),
    region = case_when(
      site == "lago_anta" ~ "santa_virginia",
      .default = "sao_luis_paraitinga"),
    country = "brazil",
    project = "BOFA"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_stage_simple),
         !is.na(bd_its_copies),
         life_stage_simple %in% c("adult", "subadult"),
         site != "roberto")

bofa_sites = bofa_clean %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarize(site_latitude = mean(lat, na.rm = TRUE),
            site_longitude = mean(long, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  # manually correct lat/lon for lago_anta, to align with other datasets
  mutate(site_latitude = if_else(site == "lago_anta", -23.38511, site_latitude),
         site_longitude = if_else(site == "lago_anta", -45.18707, site_longitude))

bofa_visit = bofa_clean %>%
  left_join(bofa_sites, by = "site") %>%
  group_by(site,
           site_latitude,
           site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            date_max = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

```

# Prepare sites
```{r}
day_buffer = 366

check_cols = compare_df_cols(rabo_visit,
                             ribbitr_visit,
                             usgs_visit,
                             raca_visit,
                             ralu_visit,
                             hyphy_visit,
                             bofa_visit)

site_date_combined = bind_rows(rabo_visit,
                               ribbitr_visit,
                               usgs_visit,
                               raca_visit,
                               ralu_visit,
                               hyphy_visit,
                               bofa_visit) %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  mutate(site_latitude = mean(site_latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
         site_longitude = mean(site_longitude, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(site, site_latitude, site_longitude) %>%
  summarize(date_min = min(date_min),
            date_max = max(date_max),
            .groups = "drop")

check_site_unique = get_dupes(site_date_combined, site)

site_date_all = site_date_combined %>%
  mutate(start_date = date_min - days(day_buffer),
         end_date = date_max) %>%
  dplyr::rename(latitude = site_latitude,
                longitude = site_longitude,
                site_name = site) %>%
  select(-date_min,
         -date_max)

days_count = function(df) {
  df %>%
  mutate(days = interval(date_min, date_max)) %>%
  summarize(total_days = sum(days)) %>%
    pull(total_days)
}

days_count(ribbitr_visit)
days_count(usgs_visit)
days_count(raca_visit)
days_count(ralu_visit)

site_date_pre_2017 = site_date_all %>%
  filter(start_date <= "2016-12-31") %>%
  mutate(end_date = if_else(end_date > "2016-12-31", as.Date("2016-12-31"), end_date))

site_date_post_2017 = site_date_all %>%
  filter(end_date >= "2017-01-01") %>%
  mutate(start_date = if_else(start_date < "2017-01-01", as.Date("2017-01-01"), start_date))


# export
write_csv(site_date_all, here("python", "environmental_timeseries_pull", "inputs", paste0("site_date_all_", today(), ".csv")))
write_csv(site_date_pre_2017, here("python", "environmental_timeseries_pull", "inputs", paste0("site_date_pre_2017_", today(), ".csv")))
write_csv(site_date_post_2017, here("python", "environmental_timeseries_pull", "inputs", paste0("site_date_post_2017_", today(), ".csv")))


```

# Run `pull_environmental_timeseries.py`

# Import timeseries
```{r}
env_in = read_csv(here("python", "environmental_timeseries_pull", "outputs", "all_sites_combined_chirps_chirts_2026-04-22.csv")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site = site_name,
         precipitation_mm = precip_mm,
         temperature_max_c = tmax_c)
```

# Calculate rolling timeseries
```{r}
env_agg = env_in %>%
  arrange(site, date) %>%
  filter(!(is.na(precipitation_mm) & is.na(temperature_max_c))) %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  mutate(precip_mm_10_day_sum = zoo::rollapply(precipitation_mm, 10, sum, fill = NA, align = "right"),
         precip_mm_30_day_sum = zoo::rollapply(precipitation_mm, 30, sum, fill = NA, align = "right"),
         temp_c_10_day_mean = zoo::rollapply(temperature_max_c, 10, mean, fill = NA, align = "right"),
         temp_c_30_day_mean = zoo::rollapply(temperature_max_c, 30, mean, fill = NA, align = "right")
         ) %>%
  ungroup()

env_var_index = env_in %>%
  arrange(site, date) %>%
  filter(!(is.na(precipitation_mm) & is.na(temperature_max_c))) %>%
  mutate(year = year(date),
         week_of_year = week(date),
         week_number = 52 * year + week_of_year)

env_var_week = env_var_index %>%
  group_by(site, week_number) %>%
  summarize(weekly_precipitation_mm = mean(precipitation_mm) * 7,
            weekly_temperature_max_c = max(temperature_max_c),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  mutate(past_year_weekly_precipitation_mm_sd = zoo::rollapply(weekly_precipitation_mm, 52, sd, fill = NA, align = "right"),
         past_year_weekly_tempurature_max_c_sd = zoo::rollapply(weekly_temperature_max_c, 52, sd, fill = NA, align = "right"))

env_var_agg = env_var_index %>%
  left_join(env_var_week, by = c("site", "week_number")) %>%
  select(date,
         site,
         past_year_weekly_precipitation_mm_sd,
         past_year_weekly_tempurature_max_c_sd)

env_agg_all = env_agg %>%
  left_join(env_var_agg, by = c("site", "date"))


```

# Write env agg
```{r}
write_csv(env_agg_all, here("data", "unified_env_agg.csv"))
```
